steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: (() => { const close = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Close')); if (close) { close.click(); } window.__artifactDownloadCapture = { filename: '', payload: '', mimeType: '' }; const originalCreate = URL.createObjectURL.bind(URL); URL.createObjectURL = (blob) => { window.__artifactDownloadCapture.mimeType = blob.type || ''; blob.text().then((text) => { window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload = text; }); return originalCreate(blob); }; const originalClick = HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click; HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click = function() { window.__artifactDownloadCapture.filename = this.download || ''; return originalClick.call(this); }; })()

(() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; if (!preview || typeof preview.patchBuilderState !== 'function') { throw new Error('Preview patchBuilderState API not available.'); } const nextState = preview.patchBuilderState({ selectedDimensions: ['country'], selectedMeasures: ['avails'], primaryMeasure: 'avails', viewMode: 'table', chartSpec: null, orderField: 'country', orderDir: 'desc' }); if (!nextState || !Array.isArray(nextState.selectedDimensions) || nextState.selectedDimensions[0] !== 'country') { throw new Error('Failed to pivot builder state to country dimension.'); } return true; })()

steps.text: Market Geo added to the report document.

steps.expression: (() => { const preview = window.__REPORT_BUILDER_PREVIEW__; if (!preview || typeof preview.replaceCollectionRows !== 'function') { throw new Error('Preview replaceCollectionRows API not available.'); } preview.replaceCollectionRows([{ country: 'CA', avails: 1200000 }, { country: 'WA', avails: 980000 }], { hasMore: false, error: null }); return true; })()

(() => { const root = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview'); const text = root?.innerText || root?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Market Geo') && text.includes('2 Regions') && text.includes('CA') && text.includes('WA'); })()

steps.text: Saved exploration artifact: Report Builder Demo
Saved report payload: Report Builder Demo

steps.expression: (() => { const notice = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__chart-inline-notice')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '')).includes('Saved report payload: Report Builder Demo')); if (!notice) { throw new Error('Saved report payload section not found.'); } const button = Array.from(notice.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Inspect export')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Inspect export button not found for saved report payload.'); } button.click(); return true; })()

(() => { const summary = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[aria-label="Saved export request summary"]')).find(Boolean); if (!summary) { throw new Error('Saved export request summary not found.'); } const container = summary.closest('.forge-report-builder__chart-inline-notice'); const button = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Download export request')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Download export request button not found.'); } button.click(); return true; })()

window.__artifactDownloadCapture && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.mimeType.includes('application/json') && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload.includes('"kind": "reportExportRequest"') && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload.includes('"kind": "reportPrint"') && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload.includes('Top Regions') && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload.includes('Total Available Impressions: 2,180,000') && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload.includes('Top: CA') && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload.includes('2 Regions') && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload.includes('CA') && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload.includes('WA')
